title: Soft Night Sounds
poem_text:
Drip drop, drip drop slow,
Whisper low, whisper low.
Pitter pat, pitter pat,
Moonlight chat, moonlight chat.
Buzz hum, buzz hum near,
Firefly cheer, firefly cheer.
Sigh breeze, sigh breeze through,
Dreaming you, dreaming you.
cover_context: A cozy night scene with fireflies glowing softly over a sleeping child wrapped in a starry blanket.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, kalimba and gentle shaker, 93 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
